name: super-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap gates greenfield (lean ideation Q&A → seed docs), then installs the harness: CLAUDE.md, skeleton docs, path-scoped rules, curated skill/MCP/hook picks. Bundles commit, todo, log, help, merge, and optional release-init — all namespaced under super-bootstrap: except the entry. Per-skill contracts live in each SKILL.md frontmatter (canonical catalog); plugin README carries the index. Solo dev workflow.
